    Index

    A B C D E F G H I M N O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    G

    GAME_OVER - Enum constant in enum class core.MoveResult.Status
    The action was rejected because the match has already concluded.
    GameEngine - Class in core
    The core engine of the Kuroshiro game, responsible for managing the central game state.
    GameEngine(Board) - Constructor for class core.GameEngine
    Initializes a new GameEngine with the specified board configuration.
    GameEngineTest - Class in core
    Unit tests for the GameEngine mechanics and win conditions.
    GameEngineTest() - Constructor for class core.GameEngineTest
     
    GameSetup - Class in util
    A utility class responsible for initializing the Kuroshiro game board.
    GameSetup() - Constructor for class util.GameSetup
     
    GameSetupTest - Class in util
    Unit tests for the GameSetup utility.
    GameSetupTest() - Constructor for class util.GameSetupTest
     
    getBoard() - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Provides direct access to the current state of the game board.
    getCapturedPiece() - Method in class core.MoveResult
    Retrieves the piece that was affected (captured or damaged) during this action.
    getCol() - Method in class core.Position
    Retrieves the internal column index of this position.
    getColor() - Method in class core.Piece
    Retrieves the color affiliation of this piece.
    getCurrentTurn() - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Returns the color of the player whose turn it currently is.
    getLegalMoves(Board) - Method in interface core.Moveable
    Calculates all valid, legal destination coordinates for this entity.
    getLegalMoves(Board) - Method in class core.Piece
     
    getLegalMoves(Board) - Method in class pieces.Archer
    Calculates all legal movement destinations for the Archer.
    getLegalMoves(Board) - Method in class pieces.Archmage
    Calculates all legal movement destinations for the Archmage.
    getLegalMoves(Board) - Method in class pieces.Assassin
    Calculates all legal movement and attack destinations for the Assassin.
    getLegalMoves(Board) - Method in class pieces.Dragon
    Calculates all legal movement and attack destinations for the Dragon.
    getLegalMoves(Board) - Method in class pieces.Mage
    Calculates all legal movement destinations for the Mage.
    getLegalMoves(Board) - Method in class pieces.Warrior
    Calculates all legal movement and capture destinations for the Warrior.
    getLives() - Method in class pieces.Warrior
    Retrieves the current number of lives the Warrior has remaining.
    getMagicCooldown() - Method in class pieces.Archmage
    Retrieves the current number of turns remaining on the magic cooldown timer.
    getPieceAt(Position) - Method in class core.Board
    Retrieves the piece currently occupying the specified position.
    getPieces(Color) - Method in class core.Board
    Retrieves a list of all active pieces on the board belonging to a specific player.
    getPosition() - Method in class core.Piece
    Retrieves the current board coordinate of this piece.
    getPromotionColor() - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Returns the color of the piece currently awaiting promotion.
    getPromotionPosition() - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Returns the board coordinate where the promotion is taking place.
    getRow() - Method in class core.Position
    Retrieves the internal row index of this position.
    getSafeMoves(Piece) - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Retrieves all legal movement destinations for a specific piece on the current board layout.
    getShootTargets(Board) - Method in class pieces.Archer
    Identifies all valid enemy targets within the Archer's diagonal range.
    getShootTargets(Board) - Method in class pieces.Archmage
    Identifies all valid enemy targets the Archmage can currently strike with magic.
    getShootTargets(Board) - Method in class pieces.Mage
    Identifies all valid enemy targets the Mage can currently shoot.
    getStatus() - Method in class core.MoveResult
    Retrieves the execution status of the attempted action.
    getSymbol() - Method in interface core.Moveable
    Retrieves the visual identifier representing this specific entity type.
    getSymbol() - Method in class core.Piece
     
    getSymbol() - Method in class pieces.Archer
    Returns the unique symbol used to represent the Archer in text-based rendering.
    getSymbol() - Method in class pieces.Archmage
    Returns the unique symbol used to represent the Archmage in text-based rendering.
    getSymbol() - Method in class pieces.Assassin
    Returns the unique symbol used to represent the Assassin in text-based rendering.
    getSymbol() - Method in class pieces.Dragon
    Returns the unique symbol used to represent the Dragon in text-based rendering.
    getSymbol() - Method in class pieces.Mage
    Returns the unique symbol used to represent the Mage in text-based rendering.
    getSymbol() - Method in class pieces.Warrior
    Returns the unique symbol used to represent the Warrior in text-based rendering.
    getTargets(Board) - Method in interface core.Shootable
    Calculates all valid enemy coordinates that this piece can currently target.
    getTargets(Board) - Method in class pieces.Archer
    Implementation of the Shootable interface to provide valid targets.
    getTargets(Board) - Method in class pieces.Archmage
    Fulfills the Shootable interface requirement by providing the list of valid magic targets.
    getTargets(Board) - Method in class pieces.Mage
    Fulfills the Shootable interface requirement by providing the list of valid shooting targets.
    getTotalMoves() - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Returns the total number of actions (moves, stabs, shoots) executed in the match.
    getWinner() - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Returns the player who won the game.
